raw:
## Completed
Re-checked the implementation and found no blocking issue. Per founder instruction, I made no further changes and am re-emitting the DEV-JSON handoff.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - adds `formatIntentContract`.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - injects persisted Gate-1 intent into developer/tester prompts and retry rounds.
- `extensions/foreman/crew/developer.md` - acknowledges Founder-approved intent as source of truth.
- `extensions/foreman/crew/tester.md` - judges against Founder-approved intent and respects non-goals.
- `extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh` - covers intent rendering and wiring assertions.

## How To Verify
`grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

## Notes
Self-check run: `bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh` passed.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)

  "summary": "Re-checked the Gate-1 intent contract implementation and made no further changes per founder instruction. The implementation injects founder-approved understanding, assumptions, and non-goals into developer and tester prompts.",

    "extensions/foreman/crew/tester.md - documents judging against Founder-approved intent and respecting non-goals",
    "extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh - adds intent rendering and wiring assertions"
  ],
  "howToVerify": "grep -q \"claude-opus-4-8:xhigh\" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh"
}
